properties.name: tags
properties.value: transformers, safetensors, qwen2, text-generation, chat, conversational, en, arxiv:2309.00071, arxiv:2407.10671, base_model:Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B, base_model:finetune:Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B, license:apache-2.0, autotrain_compatible, text-generation-inference, endpoints_compatible, region:us

properties.name: intendedUse
properties.value: General-purpose instruction-following conversational AI and text generation, supporting more than 29 languages.

components.name: PG19
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: Fine-tuning dataset for extending the context window of Llama 2 models using YaRN method, chunked into 64k token segments.

properties.name: owner
properties.value: Colin Raffel et al., Google Research

components.name: Proof-pile
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: Dataset with long documents used for evaluating the sliding window perplexity of models with extended context windows.

components.name: GovReport
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: Dataset of long documents used to evaluate long sequence language modeling perplexity for models fine-tuned with extended context.

properties.name: owner
properties.value: Bingjie Xu, Satoshi Okazaki, Jinho D. Choi

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: GovReport: Efficient Long Document Summarization by Selective Contextual Encoding

components.name: Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard benchmarks
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: Set of standardized benchmarks (including ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag, MMLU, and TruthfulQA) used for benchmarking and comparing model performance under extended context windows.

properties.name: owner
properties.value: Hugging Face and contributing dataset authors

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard Public Benchmark Suite

components.name: ARC-Challenge
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: 25-shot ARC-Challenge dataset used as part of the Open LLM Leaderboard benchmarks to assess model reasoning capabilities.

components.name: HellaSwag
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: 10-shot HellaSwag used for commonsense reasoning evaluation as part of benchmark suite.

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: HellaSwag: Can a Machine Really Finish Your Sentence?

components.name: MMLU
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: 5-shot MMLU dataset used to evaluate multi-domain knowledge and reasoning abilities of the model.

components.name: TruthfulQA
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: 0-shot TruthfulQA dataset evaluating models on truthful question answering abilities as part of benchmarking.

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: TruthfulQA: Measuring How Models Mimic Human Falsehoods

components.name: RedPajama
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: Dataset used to select documents for studying the impact of scaling the softmax temperature in YaRN on perplexity. It is used to analyze token-level perplexity variation under different scaling factors.

components.name: Together Computer's Long-Data Collections
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2309.00071

properties.name: description
properties.value: Used as training data (a mix of pre-train and fine-tune splits) for extending context windows of Mistral 7B models with YaRN.

components.name: MMLU
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: English knowledge and general question answering evaluated with few-shot prompting for base models and instruction-tuned models.

properties.name: owner
properties.value: Hendrycks et al., University of California, Berkeley

components.name: MMLU-Pro
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Pro version of MMLU dataset focusing on professional knowledge; used for evaluation of general knowledge performance.

components.name: GPQA
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Benchmark for factual and knowledge-based question answering evaluated in a few-shot setting.

components.name: Theorem QA
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Dataset for evaluating scientific and theorem-related question answering capabilities with few-shot prompts.

properties.name: owner
properties.value: Original authors of Theorem QA dataset

components.name: BBH
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Big Bench Hard benchmark including difficult reasoning and commonsense challenges, evaluated in few-shot mode.

components.name: HellaSwag
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Commonsense reasoning task using multiple-choice questions to assess natural language understanding.

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: HellaSwag: Can a Machine Really Finish Your Sentence?

components.name: Winogrande
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Commonsense reasoning benchmark built on Winograd Schema format, tested with few-shot prompting.

components.name: ARC-C
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: ARC Challenge dataset testing advanced question-answering in science; evaluated with multiple shots.

components.name: TruthfulQA
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Benchmark designed to test model truthfulness and hallucination resistance, evaluated zero-shot.

components.name: HumanEval
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Coding benchmark consisting of Python programming problems used to evaluate code generation capabilities.

components.name: MBPP
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multi-lingual benchmark for code generation problems, focusing on Python programming tasks evaluated zero-shot.

components.name: EvalPlus
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Evaluation benchmark for code generation across multiple programming languages, conducted at zero-shot.

components.name: MultiPL-E
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multilingual Programming Language Evaluation for multiple languages (Python, C++, Java, etc.), zero-shot tested.

components.name: GSM8K
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Grade School Math dataset to evaluate multi-step mathematical reasoning with few-shot prompting.

components.name: MATH
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Mathematics competition problems dataset used to evaluate advanced math problem-solving capabilities.

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: MATH Dataset: Mathematics Dataset from High School Contests

components.name: C-Eval
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Chinese evaluation dataset for knowledge and multi-domain assessment, evaluated with few-shot prompting.

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: C-Eval: A Comprehensive Chinese Evaluation Benchmark

components.name: CMMLU
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Chinese Multi-domain Multi-level Understanding benchmark evaluating complex Chinese language comprehension.

components.name: M3Exam
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multilingual multiple-choice exam dataset focusing on educational tests in multiple languages, excluding images.

components.name: IndoMMLU
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multilingual language understanding benchmark in Indonesian language, used for multilingual evaluation.

components.name: ruMMLU
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Russian version of MMLU for multilingual language understanding evaluation in Russian.

components.name: PAWS-X
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Paraphrase Adversaries from Word Scrambling cross-lingual dataset, assessing paraphrase identification capability in multiple languages.

components.name: BELEBELE
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multilingual benchmark assessing natural language understanding across several low-resource languages.

components.name: XCOPA
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Cross-lingual Choice of Plausible Alternatives dataset for causal reasoning across languages.

components.name: XWinograd
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multilingual Winograd Schema Challenge, assessing commonsense reasoning across multiple languages.

components.name: XStoryCloze
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multilingual story completion dataset, zero-shot evaluated for narrative understanding.

components.name: Flores-101
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multilingual dataset for machine translation evaluation across 101 languages, used for translation benchmarking.

components.name: MT-Bench
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Multi-turn human preference benchmark to assess instruction-following and preference alignment in instruction-tuned models.

components.name: Arena-Hard
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Difficult evaluation set from Chatbot Arena to test human preference alignment and instruction-following.

components.name: AlignBench
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Benchmark designed to assess alignment and instruction-following quality for LLMs.

components.name: MixEval
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Aggregate benchmark approximating Chatbot Arena results, assessing human preference and instruction adherence.

components.name: IFEval
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Instruction-following evaluation benchmark, results reported on strict-prompt subset.

components.name: LiveCodeBench v1
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Benchmark for evaluating coding capabilities of instruction-tuned models.

components.name: Needle in a Haystack (NIAH)
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Long context understanding test that evaluates the ability to locate facts buried in long text streams of varying lengths.

components.name: NeedleBench
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Enhanced NIAH benchmark with multiple facts requiring multi-hop reasoning in passages up to 256k tokens.

components.name: LV-Eval
components.description: Dataset extracted from arXiv paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.10671

properties.name: description
properties.value: Long-context evaluation with 11 diverse QA datasets demanding comprehension of multiple evidences simultaneously.

properties.name: full_name
properties.value: LV-Eval: Long-View Evaluation suite for Long Context QA

technicalLimitations: Static YARN scaling in vLLM deployment may impact performance on shorter texts when configured for long contexts.
